item.title: AI Developer Radar｜Daily｜2026-06-13 - Today's Summary
item.description: The dominant pattern today is the sustained and accelerating interest in AI agent frameworks, particularly those that enhance coding agents with structured skills or long-term memory. addyosani/agent-skills continues its hot streak with 2,337 new stars in 24 hours and 9,077 in 7 days, indicating strong developer curiosity in production-grade agent workflows. Meanwhile, topoteretes/cognee broke out with a 2.1x acceleration, adding 116 stars in a week, as developers seek persistent memory solutions for agents. The MCP/tool calling category also remains active, with Panniantong/Agent-Reach adding 615 stars daily. In contrast, the RAG/knowledge base category is quiet, with only one project showing modest growth. The convergence of agent framework and tool calling signals suggests the ecosystem is maturing toward more capable, memory-augmented agents. Top projects: eyaltoledano/claude-task-master, stas00/ml-engineering, topoteretes/cognee, addyosmani/agent-skills, Panniantong/Agent-Reach, esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix, nexu-io/open-design, sickn33/antigravity-awesome-skills, safishamsi/graphify, rohitg00/ai-engineering-from-scratch, tirth8205/code-review-graph, getagentseal/codeburn Note: GitHub API 只提供当前 stars，总量变化来自本项目保存的历史 snapshot。 Note: daily delta 使用约 24h 前 snapshot，weekly delta 使用约 7 天前 snapshot。 Note: Accelerating 只展示至少 3 天历史基线且今日 delta 超过前 3 日均值 2 倍的项目。 Note: Potential Score 为规则评分，用于排序，不代表项目质量结论。

item.title: [sudden_breakout] eyaltoledano/claude-task-master (+63 stars/24h)
item.description: Category: Coding Agent / SWE Agent Description: An AI-powered task-management system that integrates directly into Cursor, Lovable, Windsurf, and other AI coding environments via MCP. Why it matters: With 27,315 stars and a 7-day average delta of 7.1 stars/day, the project shows sustained high attention. The acceleration ratio of 2.8 indicates a sudden breakout — interest is intensifying rapidly. The 24-hour delta of 11 stars confirms continued momentum. Developer insight: The rise of MCP-based tools like Taskmaster signals a shift from ad-hoc AI chat to structured, persistent workflows. Developers who adopt these patterns early may gain a significant productivity edge. Risk: Medium

item.title: [sudden_breakout] stas00/ml-engineering (+18 stars/24h)
item.description: Category: RAG / Knowledge Base Description: A comprehensive open book of methodologies, tools, and commands for training and fine-tuning large language and multi-modal models. Why it matters: With 18,015 stars and a sudden acceleration ratio of 2.9 (high), the repo is experiencing a breakout. The 24-hour star delta of 20 and 7-day average of 6 indicate a sharp increase in attention, likely driven by the growing need for hands-on ML engineering guidance as LLM training becomes more accessible. Developer insight: Signals a shift toward open, community-driven knowledge sharing in ML engineering, reducing the barrier for smaller teams to adopt large-scale training practices. Risk: Low

item.title: [sudden_breakout] topoteretes/cognee (+36 stars/24h)
item.description: Category: AI Agent Framework Description: Cognee is an open-source AI memory platform that gives agents persistent long-term memory via a self-hosted knowledge graph. Why it matters: Cognee has 17,804 stars and is accelerating sharply: 36 stars in the last 24 hours, 116 in the last 7 days, with a 7-day average delta of 18.8 and an acceleration ratio of 2.1 (high). This sudden breakout signals a rapid surge in attention, likely driven by the growing need for persistent memory in AI agents. Developer insight: This signals a shift toward memory-augmented AI agents as a standard architectural pattern. Developers should consider integrating persistent memory early to avoid context loss and enable cross-session learning. Risk: Low

item.title: [sustained_hot] addyosmani/agent-skills (+2337 stars/24h)
item.description: Category: AI Agent Framework Description: A production-grade pack of 24 structured skills and slash commands that encode senior engineering workflows for AI coding agents. Why it matters: The repo has exploded from 0 to 51,894 stars with a 24h delta of 2,051 and a 7d delta of 3,844. The acceleration ratio is 4 (high), indicating a sudden breakout. This is not gradual growth — it's a viral spike driven by the release of a comprehensive, well-documented skill pack for multiple agent platforms. Developer insight: The project signals a shift from ad-hoc agent prompting to structured, skill-based agent programming. It suggests that the future of AI-assisted development lies in reusable, verifiable skill packs rather than raw LLM prompts. Developers should consider adopting or contributing to such skill ecosystems. Risk: Low

item.title: [sustained_hot] Panniantong/Agent-Reach (+615 stars/24h)
item.description: Category: MCP / Tool Calling Description: Agent Reach is a CLI tool that gives AI coding agents zero-friction access to read and search across Twitter, Reddit, YouTube, GitHub, Bilibili, Xiaohongshu, and more — without any API fees. Why it matters: With 26,660 stars and a 7-day average of 800 new stars per day, Agent Reach is experiencing sustained, high-velocity growth. The 24-hour delta of 597 and acceleration of 0.7 indicate a steady, organic surge — not a one-day spike. This momentum suggests broad, ongoing adoption among AI developers who need their agents to interact with the open web. Developer insight: This signals a shift toward 'agent infrastructure' as a new category: tools that abstract away platform-specific barriers (API costs, login requirements, anti-bot measures) so agents can operate freely. The sustained star growth indicates strong product-market fit and a clear demand for open-source, community-maintained alternatives to paid data APIs. Risk: Low

item.title: [sustained_hot] esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix (+349 stars/24h)
item.description: Category: Coding Agent / SWE Agent Description: A DeepSeek-native AI coding agent for the terminal, rewritten in Go for prefix-cache stability and low token costs. Why it matters: With 21,678 stars, a 24h delta of +349, and a 7-day delta of +3,125, the project shows sustained high velocity (7-day avg 455.4 stars/day) and an acceleration of 0.8, indicating strong, steady growth without sudden spikes. It ranks top 2 in Agents and top 3 in LLMs/CLI by velocity on OOSMetrics. Developer insight: Signals a shift toward model-native tooling that exploits provider-specific optimizations (e.g., caching) to reduce costs, and a preference for compiled, single-binary distributions over interpreted runtimes. Risk: Low

item.title: [sustained_hot] nexu-io/open-design (+550 stars/24h)
item.description: Category: Coding Agent / SWE Agent Description: Open Design is a local-first, open-source alternative to Claude Design that turns your laptop into an agentic design studio with 259+ skills, 142+ design systems, and native MCP integration for 21 coding agents. Why it matters: With 64,162 stars, a 24h delta of +550, and a 7-day average of +663 stars/day, Open Design is experiencing sustained, high-velocity growth. The acceleration ratio of 0.9 indicates steady organic momentum rather than a sudden spike. This is a project that has already crossed into mainstream developer attention and continues to gain traction daily. Developer insight: The convergence of coding agents and design tools is accelerating. Open Design shows that the next frontier isn't better canvas editors but agent-readable design contracts (DESIGN.md) that produce production-ready artifacts. Developers should watch for similar patterns in other creative domains. Risk: Low

item.title: [sustained_hot] sickn33/antigravity-awesome-skills (+158 stars/24h)
item.description: Category: MCP / Tool Calling Description: Installable library of 1,541+ agentic skills for Claude Code, Cursor, Codex CLI, Gemini CLI, and other AI coding assistants. Why it matters: With 40,559 stars, 6,545 forks, and a sustained 7-day average of 94.4 stars/day (24h delta: 150, acceleration: 1.5), this project shows strong, consistent growth. The recent release v12.4.0 and active commits within 7 days signal ongoing maintenance and feature expansion, making it a reliable choice for developers seeking structured agent skill libraries. Developer insight: The project signals a shift toward standardized, reusable agent instructions, similar to package managers for code. It may become a de facto standard for skill distribution, reducing fragmentation in the AI coding tool ecosystem. Risk: Low

item.title: [sustained_hot] safishamsi/graphify (+687 stars/24h)
item.description: Category: Coding Agent / SWE Agent Description: Graphify turns any codebase, docs, or media into a queryable knowledge graph for AI coding assistants. Why it matters: With 66,476 stars, a 24h delta of +687, and a 7-day average delta of 895.1, the project shows sustained high-velocity growth. The acceleration of 0.9 (high) indicates continued strong interest without a sudden spike, suggesting organic adoption by developers integrating AI assistants into their workflows. Developer insight: This signals a shift toward 'memory layers' for AI coding agents — the next frontier is not just code generation but context retrieval. Graphify's approach of indexing code, schemas, docs, and even media into a graph could become a standard pattern for AI-assisted development. Risk: Low

item.title: [sustained_hot] rohitg00/ai-engineering-from-scratch (+351 stars/24h)
item.description: Category: AI Agent Framework Description: A massive, free, open-source curriculum (503 lessons, 20 phases) that teaches AI engineering from math foundations to production-grade agents, with every lesson producing a reusable artifact. Why it matters: With 31,756 stars, a 24-hour delta of +319, and a 7-day average of +421.6, this repo is experiencing sustained, high-velocity growth. The acceleration ratio of 0.9 (high) indicates strong organic momentum without a sudden spike, suggesting broad, steady adoption. The project's claim of 150,639 readers and 241,669 page views in the last 30 days further confirms real-world traction. Developer insight: The project signals a shift in how AI education is consumed: developers want hands-on, code-first, artifact-producing curricula that integrate with their existing tools (Claude, Cursor, etc.). The emphasis on MCP servers and agent skills points to a growing ecosystem around agentic workflows. Risk: Low

item.title: [sustained_hot] tirth8205/code-review-graph (+52 stars/24h)
item.description: Category: MCP / Tool Calling Description: Local-first code intelligence graph for MCP and CLI. Builds a persistent map of your codebase so AI coding tools read only what matters, with benchmarked context reductions on reviews and large-repo workflows. Why it matters: MCP / Tool Calling 方向保持持续热门，24h stars +52，总 stars 18,452，适合看近期 release、commit 或社区讨论是否解释了增长。 Developer insight: 重点看协议适配、工具注册和真实示例，判断它是否能降低 agent 接工具的成本。 Risk: Low

item.title: [sustained_hot] getagentseal/codeburn (+58 stars/24h)
item.description: Category: AI Agent Framework Description: See where your AI coding tokens go. Interactive TUI dashboard for Claude Code, Codex, and Cursor cost observability. Why it matters: AI Agent Framework 方向保持持续热门，24h stars +58，总 stars 7,944，适合看近期 release、commit 或社区讨论是否解释了增长。 Developer insight: 可以用一个最小样例验证 API、文档和集成成本，再决定是否纳入长期技术观察。 Risk: Low
